{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged spikes
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Forged spikes]] can be dropped from above.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Forged]] spike is a [[construct]] made of [[force madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
